description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with a boxy, geometric structure and a light wood-textured exterior. The building is composed of two main rectangular volumes, one offset and projecting forward, creating a visually interesting L-shaped footprint. Large, dark-framed windows punctuate the facade, with a prominent set of floor-to-ceiling windows on the front-facing section, likely serving as the main living area. The roof is flat and unadorned, emphasizing the contemporary architectural style. Window placement is asymmetrical, with varying sizes and positions on each visible side, contributing to the modern aesthetic. The entryway is understated, with a single, vertically oriented window or door on the recessed section, lacking decorative elements or a porch.
description: A modern, boxy house with a light wood exterior, flat roof, and large asymmetrical windows, including a prominent floor-to-ceiling glass section. The structure is composed of two offset rectangular volumes, creating a striking L-shaped form.
description_view_0: The front view shows the L-shaped structure with a large set of floor-to-ceiling windows and two vertically oriented windows on the main volume.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the recessed section with a single vertical window or door, and the flat, unbroken roofline.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front's L-shape, with two vertical windows on the main volume and the large glass section visible on the projecting volume.
description_view_3: This side view displays three vertically oriented windows in a row, emphasizing the asymmetrical window arrangement and the flat roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist entryway with a single vertical door or window, no porch or decorative elements
